title: acmispon argyraeus var. notitius
intro: Acmispon argyraeus var. notitius, also known as the Desert Mariposa Clover, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Acmispon argyraeus var. notitius include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function, among others. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the herbal preparations often used to treat respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions.
